description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on every pull request, push, and published release. The workflow has three jobs: build, test, and build-with-python, and build-aarch64. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a rockylinux:8 image, installing dependencies, building and testing ninja in debug and release modes, and uploading artifacts. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:20.04 image, testing ninja with GCC and Clang. The build-with-python job runs on ubuntu-latest with multiple ubuntu images, building ninja with Python. The build-aarch64 job builds ninja on Linux ARM64.
